project: Integrated Policy, Claims, and Payments Platform
description: A comprehensive insurance platform for managing policies, claims, payments, and vendors

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Users can register with email and password

features.name: User Login
features.description: Users can login and receive JWT tokens for authentication

features.name: Get Current User
features.description: Authenticated users can retrieve their profile information

features.name: Create Policy
features.description: Create new insurance policies with comprehensive details

features.name: Search Policies
features.description: Search policies by number, insured name, organization, type, location with pagination

features.name: Get Policy Details
features.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific policy

features.name: Update Policy
features.description: Update existing policy information

features.name: Get Policy Claims History
features.description: Retrieve all claims associated with a policy with optional status filtering

features.name: Create Claim
features.description: Create new insurance claims linked to policies

features.name: Search Claims
features.description: Search claims by number, policy, status, loss date range with pagination

features.name: Get Claim Details
features.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific claim

features.name: Update Claim
features.description: Update existing claim information

features.name: Update Claim Policy Data
features.description: Update claim-level policy data for unverified policies

features.name: Refer Claim to Subrogation
features.description: Refer a claim to the subrogation process

features.name: Create Payment
features.description: Create new payments for claims and policies

features.name: Search Payments
features.description: Search payments by number, claim, policy, status, method with pagination

features.name: Get Payment Details
features.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific payment

features.name: Update Payment
features.description: Update existing payment information

features.name: Void Payment
features.description: Void a payment that was issued in error

features.name: Reverse Payment
features.description: Reverse a payment that needs to be undone

features.name: Reissue Payment
features.description: Reissue a payment that failed or needs to be resent

features.name: Add Payment Detail
features.description: Add a payment detail (payee) to a payment

features.name: Remove Payment Detail
features.description: Remove a payment detail from a payment

features.name: Get Payment Details List
features.description: Retrieve all payment details (payees) for a payment

features.name: Create Vendor
features.description: Onboard new vendors for payment processing

features.name: List Vendors
features.description: Retrieve a list of all vendors

features.name: Get Vendor Details
features.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific vendor

features.name: Update Vendor
features.description: Update existing vendor information

features.name: Verify Vendor Payment Method
features.description: Verify and activate a vendor's payment method

features.name: Health Checks
features.description: Liveness and readiness probes for monitoring

features.name: CORS Middleware
features.description: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing support

features.name: Request Logging Middleware
features.description: Automatic logging of all HTTP requests with timing

features.name: Correlation ID Middleware
features.description: Request correlation tracking across the system

features.name: Global Exception Handling
features.description: Consistent error responses across all endpoints

features.name: JWT Authentication
features.description: Token-based authentication with Bearer tokens

features.name: Password Hashing
features.description: Secure password storage with bcrypt

features.name: Audit Logging
features.description: Comprehensive audit trail for all operations
